task: edu safety coach verified RAG anchors

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion report requires original requirement checklist, item-by-item evidence, real user-facing or runtime verification, and completion guard evidence.
Code changes must use origin main, Mac Mini deploy script, real runtime verification, completion evidence guard, and no completion hallucination without evidence mapping.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Do not create one-off fixes for only the exact homework or 10 pilot questions; apply generally to comparable parent AI-safety questions.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/backend/main.py adds verified anchor fallback by intent groups and tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py covers common AI parent intent families plus a non-pilot generic math-score case.

requirements_checklist.requirement: RAG candidates must attach to final answers when relevant, with source attribution and a clickable URL.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Full available-question evaluation docs/reviews/edu_coach_simulations/full_available_safety_coach_eval_20260628T094100Z.json evaluated 54,936 deduped questions; rag_expected=12,968, rag_pass=12,968, rag_fail=0. The final answer path checks 출처: and http link when RAG is expected.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Do not attribute Korean paraphrases to source pages unless the source actually contains the quoted phrase.
requirements_checklist.evidence: data/edu_research/evidence_anchors.json now stores source_quote; _edu_vp_safety_coach_rag_sentence uses source_quote and states it is actually present; scripts/verify_edu_safety_coach_rag_sources.py verifies source_quote in fetched source pages.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Avoid markdown rendering leakage such as raw ** in user-facing answers.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Full available-question evaluation docs/reviews/edu_coach_simulations/full_available_safety_coach_eval_20260628T094100Z.json had no markdown_bold_marker_leak count. The 10-question source verification also returned ok=true.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Fallback answer quality must not regress into generic templates when model deadlines occur.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/backend/main.py replaces the old generic 'AI 교육이나 학습을 시작할 때는...' fallback and adds parent AI-safety intent routing. tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py asserts common parent AI intents avoid that generic template. Full available-question evaluation had no generic_template count for that marker.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Do not report completion until the latest pushed code is deployed and verified on Mac Mini service/API.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Commits through aa4c3dc were pushed to origin/main and deployed with scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh. Mac Mini deploy verified origin diff=0 for backend/test/report/evidence files, backend reload on port 8000, Mac Mini full evaluation, and final 10-question API probe.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Evaluate every available question, not only the 10-question API pilot.
requirements_checklist.evidence: scripts/evaluate_edu_safety_coach_available_questions.py loaded corpus_utterances_*.jsonl, gold_set_seed_2026-06-27.jsonl, judge_calibration_20260627T085846Z.jsonl, and run_20260627T104048Z_adversarial_current_fallback.jsonl; 136,297 raw rows were deduped to 54,936 unique questions and evaluated.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Residual risk must not be hidden if the full corpus still contains quality issues.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Full evaluation still reports verdict:needs_work=26,819, mostly question_not_addressed from raw source snippets and non-question titles such as event/news/article fragments. This is recorded as residual risk rather than completion.

verification.name: all available edu safety-coach question evaluation
verification.result: 54,936 unique questions evaluated; rag_expected=12,968; rag_pass=12,968; source_quote_verified=24,062; source_urls_checked=9; no rag_fail/source_quote_missing/source_quote_verify_fail/markdown_bold_marker_leak/generic_template counts; residual quality issues remain in raw corpus snippets. Script output-path handling was updated to support Mac Mini /tmp report paths without crashing after report write.

verification.name: all available edu safety-coach question evaluation on Mac Mini
verification.target: Mac Mini backend deterministic final-answer path
verification.result: 57,068 unique Mac Mini-local questions evaluated; rag_expected=13,215; rag_pass=13,215; source_quote_verified=24,508; source_urls_checked=9; no hard RAG/source/markdown/generic-template failures. Mac Mini had more local jsonl inputs than the repo-tracked local set.

verification.name: 10-question Mac Mini service API probe
verification.command: ssh macmini python API probe using X-Edu-Training-Auth and X-Harness-Secret, with unique concept_id per question
verification.result: 10/10 HTTP 200 and ok=true; all_evidence_used=true; all_have_source_and_link=true; all_have_verified_quote_marker=true; all_have_summary_break=true; all_source_spacing_ok=true; any_markdown_bold_leak=false; any_old_generic_template=false.

verification.name: 10-question local RAG source quote verification
verification.target: local backend function plus source URLs
verification.result: ok=true; all 10 pilot questions selected at least one RAG item; every selected source_url contained the configured source_quote after HTML entity normalization.

verification.name: 10-question local RAG candidate probe
verification.result: all 10 pilot questions returned selected_count >= 1 with source_url and source_quote.

verification.name: edu safety coach regression tests
verification.result: 124 passed, 5 warnings, 36 subtests passed after anchor match tightening, fallback template replacement, and summary-before-source formatting guard.

verification.name: edu coach simulation regression guard
verification.result: ok=true; latency, structured packet, auto reinforcement, freshness, corpus/adversarial thresholds passed.

verification.name: edu app production bundle build
verification.result: vite build succeeded and produced dist assets.

deploy.result: deployed through commit aa4c3dc; deploy guard passed, backend launchd reloaded, port 8000 served, and origin diff check returned 0 for all deployed files.
